query: overcast gray flat lighting dull cloudy day no shadows depth collapsed
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: flat lighting — overcast gray, foggy collapsed depth, dull cloudy atmosphere, monotone bleakness

response.objective_caption: A row of evergreen trees stands behind a chain-link fence, with a dark field in the foreground. Dense fog obscures the background and causes the upper portions of the trees to blend into bright, featureless gray.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A row of evergreen trees stands behind a chain-link fence, with a dark field in the foreground, rendered in muted, faded tones with oppressively low contrast. Dense fog smothers the scene, creating a heavy, suffocating atmosphere of atmospheric distress as forms dissolve into a bleak, indistinct haze.
